objective: Implement immutable duplicate evidence, explicit duplicate review snapshots, and append-only resolution decisions with downstream invalidation for stale consequence assumptions.
forbiddenLocalShortcuts: Do not collapse duplicate review into idempotent replay handling.
Do not leave downstream invalidation implicit in prose.
Do not mutate stale approvals, previews, or seeds in place without an explicit invalidation record.
mandatoryTests: duplicate attach versus separation decisions remain distinct from replay collision handling
duplicate reversal invalidates stale approvals and stale endpoint previews
duplicate reversal invalidates stale booking and pharmacy seeds
audit trail preserves original duplicate assumptions as provenance after reversal
failClosedConditions: Missing duplicate evidence or ambiguous cluster lineage blocks resolution.
Missing invalidation emission for stale downstream artifacts blocks settlement.
temporarySeams: Emit a stable invalidation event envelope keyed by DuplicateResolutionDecision id so consequence tracks can integrate without object-name drift.
